location.name: has_error_signal
location.label: We don't merge the error variables to allow immediate processing upon taking the transition

query.comment: Live requested memory.
Live allocated memory.
Live padded memory.
Live page memory.
Total requested memory.
Total allocated memory.
Total padded memory.
Total page memory.
Free heap memory for page-view.
Largest free block for page-view.
Amount of (partially) allocated pages.
Smallest allocated size.
Largest allocated size.
Smallest requested size.
Largest requested size.
Smallest padding of an allocation request.
Largest padding of an allocation request.
Largest amount of live allocated memory.
Largest amount of live requested memory.
Largest amount of live padded memory.
Largest amount of live page memory.
Amount of actions processed.
Amount of allocations processed.
Amount of frees processed.
Point in time when trace is done.
Track the error state of the trace.
Track the error state of an allocator.
Track the error state of a heap.
Relative internal fragmentation.
Fragmentation method: required peak fragmentation averaged over peaks.
Fragmentation method: reserved peak fragmentation averaged over peaks.
Fragmentation method: required peak fragmentation at best res peak.
Fragmentation method: reserved peak fragmentation at best req peak.
Fragmentation method: required peak fragmentation at worst res peak.
Fragmentation method: reserved peak fragmentation at worst req peak.
Fragmentation method: max peak fragmentation
Fragmentation util: max requested memory for the required method.
Fragmentation util: reserved memory upper bound for the required method.
Fragmentation util: reserved memory lower bound for the required method.
Fragmentation util: Peak count for the max requested memory for the required method.
Fragmentation util: Allocation count of the upper bound reserved memory for the required method.
Fragmentation util: Allocation count of the lower bound reserved memory for the required method.
Fragmentation util: max reserved memory for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: required memory upper bound for the reserved method.
Fragmentation Util: required memory lower bound for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: Peak count for the max requested memory for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: Allocation count of the upper bound reserved memory for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: Allocation count of the lower bound reserved memory for the reserved method.
Fragmentation method: reserved peak fragmentation averaged over peaks.
Fragmentation method: reserved peak fragmentation at best req peak.
Fragmentation method: reserved peak fragmentation at worst req peak.
Fragmentation method for requested memory: max peak fragmentation
Fragmentation util: max reserved memory for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: required memory upper bound for the reserved method.
Fragmentation Util: required memory lower bound for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: Peak count for the max requested memory for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: Allocation count of the upper bound reserved memory for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: Allocation count of the lower bound reserved memory for the reserved method.
Fragmentation method: reserved peak fragmentation averaged over peaks.
Fragmentation method: reserved peak fragmentation at best req peak.
Fragmentation method: reserved peak fragmentation at worst req peak.
Fragmentation method for allocated memory: max peak fragmentation
Fragmentation util: max reserved memory for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: required memory upper bound for the reserved method.
Fragmentation Util: required memory lower bound for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: Peak count for the max requested memory for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: Allocation count of the upper bound reserved memory for the reserved method.
Fragmentation util: Allocation count of the lower bound reserved memory for the reserved method.
External relative fragmentation for page-view free memory.
Fragmentation of LFB compared to page-view free memory.
